specific_question: Since September 2023, has the CRM system reduced the workload for employees of MediConn Solutions?
answer: According to a study completed in August 2025 by the MediConn Solutions' Operations Department, employee workload has decreased by 5-10 hours a month since implementing the CRM system in September 2023.
dr_question: According to an article in WTT Solutions in March 2025, Customer Relations Management (CRM) is an important component of any healthcare business plan. What would a business development representative look for in CRM software that would contribute to MediConn Solutions' business growth in 2026?
